title: Pure Vanilla Server
description: Pure Vanilla Server for people who are looking for a similar server like Hermitcraft.
body:
# Introduction:
Pure Vanilla Server is a server-side modpack aimed at optimization and keeping vanilla game mechanics just like hermitcraft.

# Benefits:
* Maximum performance.
* Installed only mods that improve performance or speed up a specific action.
* Fast updates.

# Installation:
The easiest and most straightforward way is to install through the Launcher.

* Install the modpack in the launcher (I used MultiMC)
* Open the Minecraft Folder.
* Move all files and folders to your server folder.

# Conclusion:
If you appreciate my work or have any question you can add my discord Kotten#0095.

Cool friend Kingsman that want to get props for it also lol (He didn't do anything...) but he did follow tho :)
